preferred_name: days remaining until next calibration (based on fixed maintenance interval)

preferred_name_ml.en: days remaining until next calibration (based on fixed maintenance interval)
preferred_name_ml.de: verbleibende Tage bis nächste Kalibrierung (feststehendes Wartungsintervall)

definition: time expressed in days that can elapse until the next calibration, calculated from the configured calibration interval

definition_ml.en: time expressed in days that can elapse until the next calibration, calculated from the configured calibration interval
definition_ml.de: Zeit ausgedrückt in Tagen, die bis zur nächsten Kalibrierung verstreichen kann, berechnet aus dem konfigurierten Kalibrierintervall

remark: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)

remark_ml.en: also used by Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
remark_ml.de: auch verwendet von Process Automation - Device Information Model (PA-DIM)
